open_repo_assist_prs.title: perf: O(n²) ILMethodDefs + lazy cache in GetField/GetPropertyImpl/GetEvent

notes: Daily 08:08 UTC. All open issues (#298, #299, #300, #384) have Repo Assist comments. All previously open PRs merged. New PR created this run (Tasks 5+8): avoid O(n^2) allocations in ILMethodDefs, use lazy caches in TargetTypeDefinition GetField/GetPropertyImpl/GetEvent. 126 tests pass.
